title: Contact
description: NAVAIR Warfighter Response Center Help Desk The NAVAIR Warfighter Response Center Help Desk is focused on connecting Fleet users with NAVAIR technical experts for authoritative aviation-related answers. For assistance related to naval aircraft, weapons, launch and recovery equipment, support equipment, IT systems, etc., please contact the Warfighter Response Center via the NAVAIR National Help Desk: CONUS Toll-Free:  1-888-292-5919 (Option 5)
text:
NAVAIR Warfighter Response Center Help Desk
The NAVAIR Warfighter Response Center Help Desk is focused on connecting Fleet users with NAVAIR technical experts for authoritative aviation-related answers. For assistance related to naval aircraft, weapons, launch and recovery equipment, support equipment, IT systems, etc., please contact the Warfighter Response Center via the NAVAIR National Help Desk:
CONUS Toll-Free: 1-888-292-5919 (Option 5)
E-mail Requests: NAV-HelpDesk@us.navy.mil
NAVAIR Unclassified Website: https://snap.navair.navy.mil/
Available 24 hours a day, seven days a week
Commander, Naval Air Systems Command
47123 Buse Road
Building 2272, Suite 540
Patuxent River, MD 20670
Employment Verification
Civilian: Contact employee to initiate process via MyBiz
Military: Send a request for a statement of service to the MPD at MPD_MILPERS@us.navy.mil
Contact NAVAIR Public Affairs
If you have questions which are base related please use our location pages to find the appropriate contact information. For NAVAIR public affairs questions call 301-757-1487 or you may submit your questions/comments below to the NAVAIR public affairs email account or here: navairpao@us.navy.mil.
Click here to view our privacy policy.
Fleet Requests
The NAVAIR Warfighter Response Center Help Desk is focused on connecting Fleet users with NAVAIR technical experts for authoritative aviation-related answers. For assistance related to naval aircraft, weapons, launch and recovery equipment, support equipment, IT systems, etc., please contact the Warfighter Response Center via the NAVAIR National Help Desk:
CONUS Toll-Free: 1-888-292-5919 (Option 3)
E-mail requests: NAV-HelpDesk@us.navy.mil
NAVAIR unclassified website: https://snap.navair.navy.mil/my.policy
Available 24 hours a day, seven days a week
Engineering Rapid Response Center (ERRC)
CONUS Toll-Free: 1-888-292-5919 Option 6
E-mail requests: F18fst@navy.mil
Available 24 hours a day, seven days a week
The ERRC is a way for Fleet maintainers and other stakeholders to contact an F/A-18 technical or engineering subject matter expert.
For all other Navy Support requests (Supply, MPT&E, Quality of Life, Safety, etc.), please contact the Navy Enterprise Service Desk. You will be connected with the appropriate Naval Command to assist you.
Toll-Free: 1-833-NESDNOW (1-833-637-3669)
Email: NESDNOW@us.navy.mil
NESD Website: https://www.nesdnow.navy.mil
Available 24 hours a day, seven days a week
Click here to access more self-help links.
NAVAIR Recruiting Office
More information can be found at the NAVAIR Careers website.
For questions regarding careers with NAVAIR, please use the following contacts:
Aircraft Division (East Coast Sites)
1-800-787-9804
Weapons Division (West Coast Sites)
1-760-608-3356
Freedom of Information Act
For questions regarding Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) for Naval Air Systems Command, please use the following website: http://foia.navair.navy.mil
The Navy official Freedom of Information website is located at: http://foia.navy.mil
Command Master Chief
Click here to contact the Naval Air Systems Command Master Chief.
Acquisition Selection Board
Click here to e-mail an Acquisition Selection Board contact.
Contact the NAVAIR Inspector General (IG) Office
Click here for information on how to file a complaint with the NAVAIR IG Office.
NAVAIR Equal Employment Opportunity
Equality of opportunity is recognized as an essential element of readiness. It is vital to attracting, developing, and retaining a top-quality workforce in order to accomplish the Department of the Navy’s strategic mission. It is DON and NAVAIR policy to ensure that equal employment opportunity (EEO) is fully integrated into the Department mission with demonstrated commitment from leadership at all levels.
Employees can find the NAVAIR EEO Policy statements can be found internally at: https://myteam.navair.navy.mil/KM/73/eeo_diversity/Pages/CommRes.aspx
General guidance on federal EEO regulations and EEO complaints process can be found at:
https://www.eeoc.gov/federal/fed_employees/complaint_overview.cfm
The DON EEO policies, DON annual MD-715 EEO Assessment Program Reports, and reasonable accommodation program can be found at
http://www.secnav.navy.mil/donhr/Site/EEO/Pages/Default.aspx
If you have questions, please contact the NAVAIR Headquarters EEO Office at 301-757-4112.
